changes.text: Fixed dashboard issue where insert/paste modal failed to open
Added Paste from Excel (Ctrl+V) to parse rows/columns into table-aligned preview data
Added paste preview modal with per-row validation, edit, and include/skip controls before insert
Added auto-fix common issues action in paste preview for number/boolean/datetime normalization
Implemented transactional batch insert API with inserted/skipped/error result reporting
Updated application version across app/frontend/npm manifests to 1.1.5
Added backend SQL history search with indexed filtering (connection, favorites, date range, sort, limit)
Optimized query result memory usage by reducing Vue deep reactivity overhead for large datasets
Added optional Query Performance Logs toggle and integrated performance events into System Logs
Implemented lazy loading for heavy modules (SQL editor and ER diagram) to improve cold start
Updated application version across app/frontend/npm manifests to 1.1.4
Updated README release highlights and feature documentation references
Implemented virtual scrolling for all query result sets to resolve performance lag
Resolved datatable context menu overflow issues
Updated application version across all files to 1.1.3
Vue optimization pass: improved dashboard rendering and memory management
Fixed laggy collapse/expand in datatable and broken Export All functionality
Optimized global reactivity to prevent UI slowdowns during multiple query execution
Fixed SQL query errors for photo retrieval and data ordering
Enhanced Activity Monitor explicitly showing HeadBlock (Blocked By) and a full query viewer dialog.
Added Kill All confirmation in Activity Monitor and excluded MSSQL background queries from tracing.
Improved AI Copilot UI and forced strict SQL-only results for immediate executing.
Added database lifecycle management actions and addressed MSSQL ALTER anomalies.
Implemented Safe Mode within DbDashboard and refined object search filters.
Resolved updater access denied errors by strictly requesting administrative elevation (UAC).
Added Single Instance locking and second instance launch handling
Improved Thai character decoding for database values and control characters
Added full lifecycle management for Stored Routines/Functions with advanced UI
Integrated SQL Editor font settings (Family & Size) and Settings Dialog
Enhanced Query History with favorites and persistence
Added Thai (i18n) language support(Developing...)
Decoupled dashboard logic into optimized composables and components
Official 1.0.0 Release
Multi-connection support with saved configurations
Connection Mode Selection (Read-Only vs Normal)
Enhanced SQL Editor with customizable fonts and themes
Advanced query statistics and streaming feedback
Type-aware input fields for data insertion (Dates, Numbers, etc.)
Integrated Toast notification system for better UX
Expandable changelog view in Settings
PostgreSQL support with improved data viewing
